title: Source-eligibility + de-identification + license + safety gate checklist
context: Before any source can be used to generate or derive a teaching dataset, the project needs a binding, non-skippable gate that encodes the cancer-domain guardrails: synthetic-default, no controlled-access data, no identifiable patient data, verified open license, and mandatory safety notice. Without a structured checklist, individual reviewers may apply inconsistent standards, creating re-identification or license-violation risk. The gate must produce a committed PASS/FLAG/EXCLUDE artifact per dataset so every decision is auditable. Risk tier is medium because this document involves license and de-identification judgement criteria that gate all subsequent work.
objective: Produce the source-eligibility, de-identification, license-verification, and safety gate checklist that must be passed (producing a committed PASS/FLAG/EXCLUDE artifact) before any source is used in a teaching-dataset task.
acceptanceCriteria: Encodes the cancer eligibility gate first: synthetic-default; derived only if open-access AND de-identified/aggregate AND no controlled-access lineage; explicit EXCLUDE of dbGaP, EGA, individual-level biobanks, and identifiable patient data.

Objective license criterion: PASS only if license.permitsReuse:true (and permitsDerivatives:true for derived) recorded from a cited clause/URL; missing/unparseable = FLAG/EXCLUDE (no default-allow). Defers NC/share-alike to policy-003.
Requires recording license id + URL + snapshot (committed copy + SHA-256 + Wayback URL).
De-id methodology for derived mode: direct-identifier heuristics, quasi-identifier k >= 5, geo-precision threshold, linkage risk; never finer than source; halt-on-signal.
Requires the safety notice present + accurate, and confirms no medical-advice/clinical content.
Produces a committed, reviewable PASS/FLAG/EXCLUDE artifact per dataset recording which checks ran and what fired.
Document committed to the project repo; commit DCO signed-off.
resources: PLAN.md (§Data, licensing & compliance; §Quality, review & risk gates)
output: A source-eligibility + de-id + license + safety gate checklist document (Markdown), plus a template PASS/FLAG/EXCLUDE artifact, committed to the project repo and ready for use as the blocking gate on every subsequent dataset task.
